textByHash.8781d70fbab366d5d700294afb4c929f181a2ec0: Hello there, I don't think I've seen you before.
textByHash.dda457f74e2de1ab27b2fc520b78bdceb0821bd4: I thought so you know! How do you like the hospitality down here? Not exactly Al Kharid town style is it? Well, I guess I'd better get back to work.
textByHash.fc88df77ae3f67f2f1fb43a470b0868167b2d11a: Don't want to get into trouble with the guards again.
textByHash.13ff6a674668f2816b6dea054a63194d41e127b7: No, not really, because I'm usually working very hard. Come to think of it, I'd better get back to work.
textByHash.0d239a746e6379ad409e2e1c674aa8bd89a3b96d: Of course not! I just don't have much choice about it a the moment.
textByHash.98759b184f8b9a5a310bdf6045e553c7018e179e: Hmmm, not really, I would have tried them already if I did. The guards seem to live in the compound. How did you get in there anyway?
textByHash.dcd06ca166dcd134dfd7b45997c80b336248990c: Wow! You're brave. How do you propose we do that? In case you hadn't noticed, this place is quite well guarded.
textByHash.4046c0e5155c3fcc60bb011e1c56a88ff140796f: That doesn't sound very likely. How did you get in here anyway? Did you deliberately hand yourself over to the guards? Ha, ha ha ha! Sorry, just kidding.
textByHash.fb95c6e0e541ddbbdcca40ed61cee3200ff5d950: Hmm, impressive, but can you so easily sneak out again? How did you manage to get through the gate?
textByHash.b49b8f212b68cf0e923be472de74aeb2c3140dab: Oh, right, well, I guess you know what you're doing. Anyway, I have to get back to work. The guards will come along soon and give us some trouble else.
textByHash.6525a3331c70749adfb528138f6ec9ecfb81063b: The only thing that gets out of here is the rock that we mine.
textByHash.97bad3812b229d99326fb5d66088e2a8f5206736: Not even the dead get a decent funeral. Bodies are just thrown down disused mine holes. It's very disrespectful...
textByHash.931480f0583e5ec2fd7b354978b14a0e3bfb63b1: Well, we mine it in this section, then someone scoops it into a barrel. The barrels are loaded onto a mine cart. Then they're deposited near the surface lift.
textByHash.643b1e133547cb2c61c6c3443ac9ed424b170a0b: I have no idea where they go from there. But that's not going to help us, is it?
textByHash.bd03fc412665945a641a122728077fad09dcadf6: Okay, well, I'm not going anywhere! -- Ana nods at a nearby guard!-- Unless he feels generous enough to let me go! -- The guard ignores the comment. --
textByHash.fdfd30367fa61f49e76edcc04faf535963dad326: Oh well, I'd better get back to work, you take care!
textByHash.cea6df9a67135b4929389be052d12db7431ff86c: Well, you would get one from around by the lift area. But why would you want one of those?
textByHash.f6105bd2409d27bf75b0b4851b2b1016f28af240: Hmmm, just don't get any funny ideas... I am not going to get into one of those barrels! Okay, have you got that?
textByHash.0d66b5ba06aef12624739c7d968c4828dc8e9c4c: Good, just make sure you keep it in mind. Anyway, I have to get back to work. The guards will come along soon and give us some trouble else.
textByHash.9eda5da7b03d2f912e8410fb0dd73685ad154ff6: No, there has to be a better way! Anyway, I have to get back to work. The guards will come along soon and give us some trouble else.
textByHash.75eeb2273ec9b2fb606ac13fbef7bc9fe07c7b27: There is no way you are getting me into a barrel. No WAY! DO you understand?
textByHash.87ae5bb82c33b31fcf7d372f9ec6bf61af19e01b: My name? Oh, how sweet, my name is Ana. I come from Al Kharid though we've only recently moved there. I was born, and did most of my growing up, in Varrock. I thought the desert might be interesting.
textByHash.439e0dc5c3655945a658ef0e2f994fc494760b94: Well, I was just touring the desert looking for the nomad tribe to the West. And I was set upon by these armoured men.
textByHash.51ddf0b28445ee9d197dd5f16a52c4584b0f36ba: I think that the guards think I am an escaped prisoner. They didn't understand that I was exploring the desert as an adventurer.
textByHash.eb87deb51446b186ba44d69d6d9a3a522e36e794: Sure, I miss my Mum, her name is Irena and she is probably waiting for me. How do you propose we get out of here though?
textByHash.f8e070e3cd84de3284a6c72f8ca3d94134a167b3: I'm sure you've noticed the many square jawed guards around here. You look like you can handle yourself, but I have my doubts that you can take them all on!
textByHash.34e1d588858855477d2e400520eb1f5ac8781dbb: Hello there, how's it going? Do you have a plan to get out of here yet?
textByHash.2bf1fcc2deec593c09766d92554c7a5ce4f3d17f: No, not not so far. I've been working very hard. Not like some people I know -- She cocks a smirk at you. --
textByHash.a272cf9e755625e270abe995481ee71dab67c715: Hey, what do you think you're doing?
textByHash.5dd3fc18a0da9b5b6c559aefa78895ddfc124a62: Hey, what do you think you're doing? Leave me alone and let me get on with my work. Else we'll both be in trouble. Oh no, NOT AGAIN!
textByHash.a3776aa218935292465067cd49f68e1403326fbc: How dare you say that I'm as heavy as lead?
textByHash.4500bfd78caa41f483ed4aa87d5e7fe649454f90: I could have told you that we wouldn't get away with it! Now look at the mess you've caused.
textByHash.35b77b50f0874c5b74700e783fe322762e61b2e3: Hey, watch it with the hands buster.
textByHash.28a369a5c9be193217f1eaa661dbda9f5aa3748a: These are the up market slaves clothes doncha know!
textByHash.4a8f714cd2b4362397d987c053313faf7253380d: Great! Thanks for getting me out of that mine! And that barrel wasn't too bad anyway! Pop by again sometime, I'm sure we'll have a barrel of laughs!
textByHash.77f5a4094c142d5608c720207f4deb491d9020d1: Oh! I nearly forgot! Here's a key I found in the tunnels. It might be of some use to you, not sure what it opens. Sorry, but I have to go now.
